candidate.name: Sample Senior Enterprise AE
candidate.cvText:
Senior Enterprise Account Executive at Datadog
San Francisco, CA
9 years quota-carrying; enterprise segment, $5M+ ACV deals.

Senior Account Executive · Datadog · San Francisco, CA
- 132% quota attainment FY24, $4.8M ARR closed
- Enterprise sales, new business, deal cycle ownership, MEDDPICC, MEDDIC
- Strategic accounts: Citi, JPMorgan, Wells Fargo, Capital One — 9-month avg cycle
- Negotiation, contract value $1M+, expansion revenue, upsell
- Pipeline generation, prospecting, territory ownership, forecasting, champion development
- Tools: Salesforce, Gong, Clari, Outreach, ZoomInfo, LinkedIn Sales Navigator
knownIssues: Senior IC AE → Sales Director step-up: matcher applies senior+leadership = -20 penalty, landing at Good (68) instead of Strong. Defensible but worth flagging — a senior IC promoting to first-line management is a common transition that the rubric currently treats as a stretch.

jobs.title: Strategic Account Executive, Financial Services
jobs.note: Same family + level + cross-region but onsite in major US hub.

jobs.title: Regional Sales Director, Enterprise
jobs.note: Senior IC → Director step-up; matcher applies senior+leadership = -20 → Good (68). Debatable; could argue Strong for clear promotion path.

jobs.title: Mid-Market Account Executive
jobs.note: Same family, level-down acceptable; cvScore still high.

jobs.title: Enterprise Account Executive — France (French-speaking)
jobs.note: Same family, missing required French — language penalty + cross-region.
